scripts.build: vp run @mariozechner/mini-lit#build && vp run @mariozechner/pi-tui#build && vp exec --filter @mariozechner/pi-ai -- tsgo -p tsconfig.build.json && vp run @mariozechner/pi-agent-core#build && vp run @mariozechner/pi-web-ui#build && vp run sitegeist#build && vp run sitegeist-site#build
scripts.check: vp check && vp run @mariozechner/mini-lit#build && vp run @mariozechner/mini-lit#check && vp run @mariozechner/pi-tui#build && vp exec --filter @mariozechner/pi-ai -- tsgo -p tsconfig.build.json && vp run @mariozechner/pi-agent-core#build && vp exec --filter @mariozechner/pi-web-ui -c 'biome check --write --error-on-warnings . && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json --noEmit' && vp run @mariozechner/pi-web-ui#build && vp run pi-web-ui-example#check && vp run sitegeist#check && vp run sitegeist-site#check
scripts.ready: vp run check && vp run build
scripts.submodules:update: git submodule update --init --recursive && git submodule update --remote packages/mini-lit packages/pi-mono && vp install
